Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Mad King]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Mad King hosts an entity that has killed Judges before.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King hates the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King wields a Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King's eyes are like two red suns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King's gaze can see across time and space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King's presence is a memory, recording, or imprint left on the Way.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Mad King clashed swords with Razael.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — The Mad King left barriers and obstacles in the Way and sealed off a Sector.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The Mad King was a former Executor recruited by the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The Mad King wore bone armor and had red eyes.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
